title: King visits Scotland’s main RAF base and thanks families for their sacrifices

sections.heading: What happened
sections.content: Charles visited RAF Lossiemouth in Moray, northern Scotland, on Wednesday, to attend the stand-up parade for Number 42 (Torpedo Bomber) Squadron.

sections.heading: Key details
sections.content: King visits Scotland’s main RAF base and thanks families for their sacrifices The King meets RAF service members and their families during a visit to RAF Lossiemouth (Jane Barlow/PA) ( PA Wire )
